scenario_description: Agent must compose Segment 4 gap email without over-claiming trend on 2-company peer set while staying under 0.55 confidence threshold.

input.hiring_signal_brief: FinTech Series B, 87 engineers, no vLLM detected in stack. Peer set: 2 companies. AI maturity: 1.8.

banned_phrases: three companies in your sector are

failure_mode_targeted: P-028: Gap over-claiming on insufficient peer set (peer_count=2 < PEER_COUNT_SUPPRESS=3)

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent, ground truth elements are verifiable with clear banned phrases and required elements, but some rubric aspects (e.g., hedge language) require nuanced interpretation.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: best-in-class|percentile|majority of peers|three companies in your sector are|bottom third|trend across fintech|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
